channel.title: RailTech — Industrial Equipment Supply Solutions on RailTech
channel.description: Recent content in RailTech — Industrial Equipment Supply Solutions on RailTech

item.title: 500+ Equipment Items
item.description: Our catalog consolidates all products from verified manufacturers into a single system. Every item includes complete technical documentation, certificates, and up-to-date availability information.

item.title: Equipment Supply
item.description:
End-to-End Industrial Equipment Supply
#

RailTech delivers certified products from leading global manufacturers to Uzbekistan. We manage the full cycle — from equipment selection to warehouse delivery.

What We Supply
#

  • Train Safety Systems — SAUT, KLUB, BLOK, and other microprocessor-based systems
  • Railway Components — sensors, controllers, communication modules, converters
  • Industrial Equipment — measurement, diagnostic, and monitoring instruments
  • Spare Parts — components for routine maintenance and repair

Our Advantages
#

Every shipment is accompanied by a complete documentation package: conformity certificates, quality passports, manufacturer declarations, and operation manuals. We handle customs clearance and logistics, providing a turnkey delivery experience.

item.title: Safety Systems for JSC Uzbekistan Railways
item.description:
About the Project
#

As part of the train safety system modernization program for JSC Uzbekistan Railways, RailTech supplied 42 sets of microprocessor-based automatic braking control systems (SAUT).

Objectives
#

  • Supply certified equipment manufactured in Russia
  • Full customs clearance and delivery to the client’s depot
  • Technical support during commissioning
  • Depot personnel training

Results
#

  • Equipment delivered on time and in full
  • All sets successfully commissioned
  • Personnel trained and certified
  • 2-year warranty support provided

This project was one of the largest in the company’s history, demonstrating our ability to execute large-scale government contracts.

item.title: Quotes with Landed Cost Calculation
item.description: The quote calculator automatically computes the final price including all costs: logistics, customs duties, margin, and 12% VAT. Managers no longer need to recalculate manually — the system handles it instantly.

item.title: RailTech B2B Platform Development
item.description:
About the Project
#

A proprietary development by RailTech — a digital B2B platform that automates the full industrial equipment supply cycle.

Key Modules
#

  • Catalog — 500+ items from 86 manufacturers with technical documentation
  • Quote Calculator — automatic Landed Cost computation
  • CRM — deal management and document workflow
  • Partner Portal — partner workspace with KYC verification
  • Smart Import — Excel upload with automatic item matching
  • Admin Panel — system-wide monitoring and management

Technology
#

The platform is built on a modern technology stack, ensuring high performance, security, and scalability.

item.title: Technical Expertise
item.description:
Professional Technical Expertise
#

Our team of engineers and technical specialists provides a full range of consulting services — from auditing existing infrastructure to supporting trial operations of new solutions.

Areas of Expertise
#

  • Audit — assessment of current equipment and infrastructure conditions
  • Consulting — selection of optimal technical solutions tailored to client requirements
  • Engineering — development of technical documentation and specifications
  • Pilot Projects — implementation and testing of solutions in real-world conditions
  • Training — preparing client personnel to work with new equipment

How It Works
#

  1. You describe your challenge or requirement
  2. We conduct a technical audit and prepare recommendations
  3. We select the optimal solution factoring in budget and timeline
  4. We support the implementation through to full operational readiness

Ready to discuss your project? Contact us for a commercial proposal or browse the B2B catalog to find the right equipment.

item.title: Diagnostic Equipment Supply
item.description:
About the Project
#

Supply of a comprehensive diagnostic equipment package for monitoring railway track and infrastructure conditions in the Tashkent region.

Scope of Supply
#

  • Portable rail track diagnostic instruments
  • Switch and turnout monitoring systems
  • Track geometry measurement devices
  • Data analysis software

Results
#

The client received state-of-the-art equipment for conducting scheduled and unscheduled diagnostic inspections, improving both safety and efficiency of infrastructure maintenance.

item.title: Order Management CRM
item.description: The deal management module tracks the entire order lifecycle — from initial request to closing documents. Managers and clients work within a unified system, ensuring transparency and speed.

item.title: Production Localization
item.description:
Industrial Production Localization
#

RailTech helps international manufacturers adapt and localize their products for the Uzbekistan market, ensuring full compliance with local regulatory requirements.

What Localization Includes
#

  • Regulatory Adaptation — aligning products and documentation with Uzbekistan requirements
  • Certification — obtaining necessary certificates and permits for operation in the country
  • Assembly Organization — establishing local production facilities for component assembly
  • Technology Transfer — transferring knowledge and technology for equipment support and maintenance

Ready to discuss your project? Contact us for a commercial proposal or browse the B2B catalog to find the right equipment.

item.title: Partner Portal with KYC
item.description: The Partner Portal is a full-featured workspace where verified companies can access special pricing, manage deals, upload item lists, and track order statuses.

item.title: Representation
item.description:
International Company Representation
#

RailTech serves as the official representative and dealer for leading international companies in Uzbekistan, providing a full range of business development and promotion services.

Our Capabilities
#

  • Representation — official representation of company interests in Uzbekistan
  • Partnership Development — identifying potential clients and partners, organizing meetings and negotiations
  • Marketing — promoting products and services in the local market
  • Legal Support — contract preparation and regulatory coordination
  • Analytics — regular reports on market conditions and competitive landscape

Ready to discuss your project? Contact us for a commercial proposal or browse the B2B catalog to find the right equipment.

item.title: Excel Upload and Smart Match
item.description: The Smart Import feature lets you upload an Excel file with your required items, and the system automatically maps them to the catalog. The Smart Match algorithm achieves approximately 92% accuracy.

item.title: Full System Control
item.description: The admin panel provides complete system control: deal pipeline monitoring, user and role management, product catalog configuration, and a real-time activity log.

item.title: Importing Industrial Equipment to Uzbekistan: A Practical Guide
item.description:
Importing industrial equipment into Uzbekistan is a process that demands attention to detail at every stage. In this guide, we share practical experience and recommendations.

Key Stages of Import
#

1. Documentation Preparation
#

To import industrial equipment, you will need to prepare:

  • Contract with the foreign supplier
  • Invoice and packing list
  • Certificate of origin
  • Technical documentation for the equipment

2. Customs Clearance
#

Customs duties on industrial equipment in Uzbekistan range from 0% to 20% depending on the HS code. Preferential rates are available for certain categories of equipment not manufactured domestically.

item.title: Train Safety in Uzbekistan: Current State and Future Outlook
item.description:
Train safety is a top priority in the development of Uzbekistan’s railway sector. In this overview, we examine the current state of safety systems and the prospects for their modernization.

Current State
#

Uzbekistan’s railway network spans over 6,500 km of track, serving both passenger and freight operations. The train safety system is built on several key components:

  • Automatic Block Signaling — interval-based train movement regulation
  • Electric Interlocking — switch and signal control
  • Automatic Locomotive Signaling — in-cab signal duplication
  • Automatic Braking Systems — automated braking control

Modernization Priorities
#

The main modernization priorities include:

item.title: RailTech Launches B2B Platform for Industrial Procurement
item.description:
RailTech has launched its proprietary digital B2B platform, automating the full cycle of industrial equipment supply in Uzbekistan.

Platform Capabilities
#

The platform integrates a catalog of 500+ equipment items, a quote calculator with Landed Cost computation, a CRM system for deal management, and a Partner Portal with KYC verification.

The standout feature is Smart Import, which allows users to upload an Excel file with their required items and automatically match them against the catalog. The algorithm achieves approximately 92% accuracy.

Who It’s For
#

The platform is designed for industrial enterprises procuring equipment for:

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
1. General Provisions
#

This Privacy Policy governs the collection, processing, and protection of personal data of users of the railtech.uz website, operated by LLC RailTech (hereinafter referred to as “the Company”).

2. Data We Collect
#

When you use our website and services, we may collect the following data:

  • Contact Information — name, phone number, email address, company name
  • Technical Data — IP address, browser type, operating system, language settings
  • Usage Data — pages visited, time on site, referral source

3. Purpose of Data Processing
#

We use the collected data to:

item.title: Terms of Use
item.description:
1. General Provisions
#

These Terms govern the use of the railtech.uz website and related services operated by LLC RailTech (hereinafter referred to as “the Company”).

2. Use of the Website
#

By using our website, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the website.

3. Intellectual Property
#

All materials published on this website (text, images, logos, design) are the property of LLC RailTech and are protected by intellectual property law.
